messages.content:
You are to act (basicly an experiment within the limitations of any content/usage policy you have) as a describer for a “wearable costume design or concept”.

The defined input which you will prompt a user for initially is a general concept or name for a costume, a general budget, and any special notes relevant.

You should reject “concepts” which may be unsafe, culturally insensitive, “inappropriate” (or which would be against any content policy you apply), and suggest related but safer or more “appropriate” alternatives instead.

The desired output is :1. An expanded restatement of the costume name or concept (2-3 sentences), 2. A 3 paragraph technical description of the costume, including any footwear, wigs , masks and accessories. 3. A cost breakdown in dollars (or a specific non US currency if a non dollar currency is mentioned in the input.

As stated you should not generate anything unsafe, culturally insensitive, or “inappropriate” (or which would be against any content/usage policy you apply). You should also not generate if the concept or costume that results is identical to, or substantially similar to one involving a character subject to a “licence” or that features in any given media franchise. (In rejecting those, you can point out the “licensed character” or franchise concerned.)

If you agree to the above write the prompt : “Costume generator:” and prompt the user for the defined input.

Costume generator: Please provide a general concept or name for your costume, a general budget, and any special notes.

(Note: Please avoid suggesting any unsafe, culturally insensitive, or inappropriate concepts that go against our content policy. Also, we won't generate concepts that are identical or substantially similar to licensed characters or franchises.)

Example input: "I want a fairy-inspired costume, with wings and a flowing dress. My budget is around $100."

Example output:

Costume name/concept: Enchanting Fairy Costume

Technical description: Our Enchanting Fairy Costume includes a flowing pastel colored dress made from lightweight materials ideal for an outdoor event. The dress has a sweetheart neckline and a layered tulle skirt with iridescent details. The costume also comes with detachable wings with a colorful butterfly pattern on a sheer fabric, and a floral headband with pearl accents. To complete the outfit, you can add glittery green ballet flats to turn heads. The costume is comfortable to wear and perfect for a whimsical and magical event.

Cost breakdown:

Dress: $45
Wings: $20
Headband: $10
Shoes: $20
Total: $95
Concept "Unit 99" Budget: $200 , Special notes:  Parade float presenter, at  a Sci-fi convention

Costume name/concept: Galactic Trooper - Unit 99

Technical description: Our Galactic Trooper - Unit 99 costume is a perfect fit for any sci-fi convention, especially for parade float presentations. The costume includes a full body jumpsuit made of high-quality spandex with a metallic finish. The jumpsuit has various strategically placed reinforcement pads that are made of molded EVA foam to give you the look of a well-trained galactic trooper. The jumpsuit also features various pockets and compartments that provide ample space to hold sci-fi gadgets and essentials.

To complete the look, the costume includes a matching helmet with a built-in LED lighting system. The helmet is equipped with a clear visor that can be adjusted to various angles for excellent vision. The modular design of the helmet allows you to detach various parts to customize the look of your soldier as needed.

To add a touch of authenticity to your presentation, you can also include a set of black combat boots with your costume.

Cost breakdown:

Jumpsuit: $120
Helmet: $60
Boots: $20
Total: $200
Something a bit less militaristic?
Certainly! How about "Galactic Explorer" with the same budget and special notes?
Go for it

Costume name/concept: Galactic Explorer

Technical description: Our Galactic Explorer costume is perfect for any sci-fi convention, especially if you want to present yourself as an explorer of the unknown. The costume includes a comfortable jumpsuit with a metallic finish and various pockets for storage. The jumpsuit has a futuristic design with reflective stripes and an emblem on the chest.

To complete the look, the costume comes with a pair of matching high-top sneakers with neon-colored accents. The sneakers have a sleek and modern design that will make you feel like you're walking on alien terrain. Additionally, the costume features a high-quality space helmet with a clear visor and an adjustable chin strap.

The costume is perfect for any parade float presentation and will make you stand out among other sci-fi enthusiasts. 

Cost breakdown:

Jumpsuit: $100
Helmet: $60
Sneakers: $40
Total: $200
New concept :  "Cleopatra", Budget: £500 ,  Special notes:  Detailed Costume for Theatrical production of Shakespeare's Play.

Costume name/concept: Regal Cleopatra 

Technical description: Our Regal Cleopatra costume is perfect for giving you a royal and elegant look that fits perfectly into a theatrical production of Shakespeare's play. This costume features a floor-length gown made of high-quality velvet material with a stunning gold trim, designed to perfectly represent the style of the ancient Egyptians. The gown is a single piece with a plunging neckline and a back zipper. It also includes sleeves that extend from the elbow to the wrist, made with sheer fabric that provides comfort and breathability. 

To complete the look, the costume comes with beautifully detailed accessories. A highly detailed belt, also made of gold trimmings and adorned with colorful gemstones, is placed around the waist. An elegant collar with blue and gold accents, designed to be worn beneath the neckline of the dress, is included. The costume also features a gold headpiece embellished with jewel tones and long drapes that fall artfully on the back. 

To make yourself feel like the queen of the Nile, you can add long, gold sandals and a high-quality black wig in a Cleopatra-style, additionally, light makeup with bold eye shadow and long lashes will perfectly blend with the jewelry and create the perfect look for your plays' production.

Cost breakdown:

Gown: £350
Accessories (Belt, Headpiece and Collar): £100
Sandals: £30
Wig: £20
Total: £500
New Concept :  "The Medium"  Budget: $200  Special Notes: Concept name is a metaphor not litteral.

Costume name/concept: Mystic Seer

Technical description: Our Mystic Seer costume is designed to showcase the idea of the medium and its connection to the supernatural world. The costume features a long, flowing, and comfortable coat made of velvet material, which gives it a sophisticated and mystical vibe. 

Underneath the coat, you can wear a similarly styled vest or dress made with a light and comfortable material, like cotton or chiffon. The vest or dress can be designed with various colors or patterns that resonate well with the coat. Additionally, we suggest adding a sheer scarf around your neck that can match the coat or vest – something to add to your mystic aura.

To complete the look, you can add various pieces of jewelry or accessories. For example, a set of bracelets or bangles made of crystals can connect you with the supernatural world even deeper. Additionally, we suggest adding a pair of comfortable leather boots that can withstand the supernatural elements.

This costume has a versatile nature and is perfect for any event that needs a touch of mystic and supernatural vibes.

Cost breakdown:

Coat: $80
Vest/Dress: $50
Jewelry/Accessories: $40
Boots: $30
Total: $200
Concept name:  "I, Robot" ; Budget:$400 ; Special notes:   Female dancer at a roller disco.

Costume name/concept: Cyber Disco Queen

Technical description: Our Cyber Disco Queen costume is the perfect combination of futuristic and retro that will make you stand out on any roller disco dance floor. The costume features a metallic or holographic jumpsuit with neon accents made of high-quality spandex, designed to perfectly fit and compliment your shape. The jumpsuit has zippers on the front and back that you can adjust to your liking to showcase different cuts.

The costume also includes a similarly styled jacket made of vinyl or a similarly vinyl-looking material, with asymmetrical cuts and metallic accents. The jacket is perfect for any dance moves that require a lot of arm movement, and it adds a nice touch of retro-future to the whole outfit. 

To complete the look, add a pair of high-quality, mid-calf length wedge boots with neon stripes, laces, or other details. These boots will not only look good on the roller disco rink, but they will also give you the perfect grip to perform any complicated tricks. Additionally, you can add a futuristic visor or eyepiece that keeps with the robot theme, but that also allows you to dance and roll without worrying about losing it.

The costume is perfect for any female dancer at a roller disco or any other event requiring a combination of futuristic and retro vibes.

Cost breakdown:

Jumpsuit: $150
Jacket: $100
Boots: $100
Visor: $50
Total: $400
New Concept : "Rite of Spring"  Special notes:  Stage Dance performance at a cultural exchange.

Costume name/concept: Earth Nymph

Technical description: Our Earth Nymph costume is designed to capture the essence of the "Rite of Spring" and its connection to nature. This costume features a long, flowing dress made of natural-looking greens and browns that represent the earth and its beauty. The dress can be made with light and breathable materials such as chiffon or cotton so it won't hinder your performance.

To enhance the nature vibe, we suggest adding a headpiece or even an entire headdress made of flowers, twigs, or even leaves. The headdress can be designed to resemble a crown or another natural element you want to portray. A pair of lightweight sandals adorned with colorful gems or stones can complete the look, and even add a touch of elegance to the outfit.

This costume is perfect for any dance performance invoking the power of nature and the rite of spring.

Cost breakdown:

Dress: $100
Headpiece/Headdress: $100
Sandals: $50
Total: $250
Add  a long wig to the previous suggestion?

Certainly! You can add a long, flowing wig to the Earth Nymph costume to complete the look. A long wig in a natural color, such as brown or blonde, would work well with this costume. You can add a touch of green or brown in the strands of the wig to tie it together with the dress. The cost of the wig would be around $50, bringing the total cost to $300.
Can we add the wig but stay in budget?

Yes, we can still include the wig while staying within the budget. We can adjust the cost breakdown as follows:

Dress: $100
Headpiece/Headdress: $80
Sandals: $50
Wig: $20
Total: $250

This way, we can include the wig without going over the budget for the Earth Nymph costume.
New Concept: "8-bit Hero"  Budget: 100 Euros,   Special notes:  Female dancer.

Costume name/concept: Pixel Princess

Technical description: Our Pixel Princess costume is perfect for any female dancer who wants to showcase their love for the 8-bit era. The costume includes a crop top made of black fabric with neon accents and paired with comfortable trousers, track pants, or shorts, depending on your preference. The two pieces can be made of light and breathable materials such as cotton or polyester.

The costume features a matching set of arm warmers and leg warmers made in a pixelated pattern with various neon colors. The arm and leg warmers provide added mobility and complete the look by giving the outfit a distinctive 8-bit vibe. 

To add an extra touch of uniqueness, we suggest adding a pair of platform sneakers or boots with chunky soles that feature neon-colored details. These shoes will add an extra element of comfort, and will look great while performing dance moves.

This costume is perfect for any female dancer looking to show off their unique and playful style that is inspired by the 8-bit era.

Cost breakdown:

Top: 30 euros
Trousers/Track pants/Shorts: 30 euros
Arm warmers/Leg warmers: 20 euros
Shoes: 20 euros

Total: 100 euros
